steps: Go to https://app.snyk.io and log in or create a free account
Click your account avatar in the top-right corner
In the 'Auth Token' section under General settings, click 'click to show'
Highlight and copy your API token
Alternatively, click 'Revoke & Regenerate' to create a new token (this invalidates the old one)
Use the token in the Authorization header as: 'token {your_api_token}'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Snyk personal API token. Sent in the Authorization header as 'token {value}'.

notes: Free tier available with limited features (open source scanning, limited projects)
One personal token per user account — regenerating it invalidates the old token
Enterprise users should create Service Account tokens for automation (Settings > Group/Org > Service Accounts)
The token is a UUID format string
Rate limits apply: 1,500 requests/min for most endpoints

test_endpoint.description: Get the currently authenticated user's details
